other_observers: On 05/26/2011 seen with Bill Maynard , Brandon Percival and Kara Carragher .; Presumably the bander Nancy ? was the original finder , but I was the finder on 5/25/2011
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch banding station. Large willow behing the banding area.
description: The song got my attention and I was expecting to see a Red-eye Vireo but instead it was a chunky Warbler Vireo looking bird but with a yellow throat and yellowish wash around the vent area. Uniform gray brown back and wings , no wing bars , darker gray cap , whitish pale supercilium with a black line through the eye to the base of the bill.In comparison to an adjacent Warbling Vireo looked chunky and shorter tailed.Behaviors: Feeding in willow and cottonwoods about 20 feet up , and singing the Red-eyed Vireo type song.Call: Very much like Red-eyed Vireo , perhaps a little quieter and longer intervals between phrases.Plumage: Adult
